title: Why I stopped fixing my charts (AI setup on XAUUSD)
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi everyone, as a developer, I have always sought to eliminate decision fatigue in trading. Here is a concrete example from this morning on Gold ($XAUUSD) using my Hercul Market tool: [https://hercul-market-web.vercel.app/](https://hercul-market-web.vercel.app/) .

Technical analysis of the trade:

The Signal: Liquidity recovery below previous lows followed by a break in structure (m5).

The AI: It identified the precise demand zone (the blue block) for optimal entry.

Result: The price reacted instantly to the zone, validating the resumption of institutional flow.

Why I built this tool:

Discipline: The AI marks the zone. If the price doesn't go there, I don't click. Period.

No more manual spreadsheets: The trade is logged directly in the database, and my IRR and drawdown are calculated without me having to open a slow .xlsx file.

Focus on data: I'd rather spend my time optimizing my NestJS backend than trying to guess if a candle is “pretty.”

I'm still looking for a few testers to refine the beta version of the structure analyzer. The link is just above.

For those who use SMC (Smart Money Concepts), would you have taken the entry on the first retracement or waited for additional confirmation? 📈
